name: tapagents
description: TapAgents marketplace — opinionated AI product team for Claude Code. One curated plugin, not a sprawl of forty.

plugins.name: tapagents
plugins.description: The full TapAgents framework — 15 agents, 17 commands, 29 protocols, stack-aware templates, seven instrumented enforcement + telemetry hooks (every hook fire / block / classification / misfire lands in events.jsonl), and an internal→public sync flow keeping the framework's two trees in lockstep. Installs a complete AI product team in your repo.
